items.title: Finish rule-unit review queue
items.reason: 532 rule units still need review before production use.
items.next_action: Review, approve, revise, split, or quarantine each queued rule unit.

items.title: Add higher-precision impact scoring
items.reason: Current impact scoring is deterministic and source-backed but not deeply semantic.
items.next_action: Add reviewed semantic scoring after enough validated outcomes exist.

items.title: Add source version comparison
items.reason: The detail layer stores source versions but does not yet show full legal text diffs.
items.next_action: Build a source-version diff view for changed statutes and regulations.

items.title: Add formal legal review before external reliance
items.reason: The app provides research and operating signals, not legal advice.
items.next_action: Define the human review workflow for externally relied-on guidance.
